title: Cyperus unistamen
taxonomy: Cyperus unistamen is classified under the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This family is part of the monocot order Poales. The genus Cyperus is a group of plants known for their distinctive sedgelike appearance. Cyperus unistamen, being a member of this genus, is a monocot plant with a unique set of characteristics. The classification of Cyperus unistamen is further supported by its botanical features, such as its leaf and stem structures.

properties: Cyperus unistamen, although lesser-known, is said to possess various therapeutic properties.
